channel.title: Data Quality on DataFibers
channel.description: Recent content in Data Quality on DataFibers

item.title: Beyond Basics: Mastering Idempotent Data Pipelines with Apache Airflow and dbt
item.description: Data engineering is the bedrock of any data-driven organization, transforming raw, often chaotic data into structured, reliable insights. While building simple ETL pipelines might seem straightforward, the real challenge emerges when dealing with production-grade requirements: robustness, scalability, observability, and crucially, idempotency. This deep-dive will move past the “Hello World” of data pipelines, exploring how Apache Airflow and dbt can be meticulously combined to construct resilient, idempotent workflows capable of handling failures, re-runs, and evolving business logic without corrupting your data.
